uses: Adamanthus pustulosus, also known as the spiny tickseed, has been used in traditional medicine for various purposes. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help in treating wounds and infections. In some cultures, the plant is used to treat fever and respiratory issues, such as cough and cold. Additionally, the plant is believed to have antioxidant properties, which may help in reducing oxidative stress and protecting against cell damage. Further research is needed to confirm the effectiveness and safety of using Adamanthus pustulosus for medicinal purposes.
